overall.description: First-person gameplay footage from Cyberpunk 2077 depicting a walk through a futuristic neon-lit urban street at dusk. The player moves beneath elevated highway structures past holographic billboards and commercial buildings, eventually ascending a stairway to an elevated pedestrian walkway overlooking the city traffic.

agents.ego_description: walking steadily along the sidewalk beneath the elevated highway structure, passing the CHOOH2 station

entered.detail: massive concrete and steel overpass spanning the street with support columns
futuristic fuel station with illuminated blue and orange signage
large holographic advertisement displaying red and white graphics
purple neon strip lighting along the building facade

segments.scene_description: The segment opens with a first-person view walking beneath a massive elevated highway structure in a futuristic city. The CHOOH2 gas station is visible on the left with its distinctive signage, while neon purple lights illuminate the right side. Sparse pedestrians walk ahead on the tiled sidewalk as vehicles pass by on the right.

scene_state.functional_zone: commercial street with heavy digital advertising

events.description: emerging from under the overpass into slightly more open lighting conditions

agents.ego_description: continuing down the commercial street passing various pedestrians and observing the holographic billboards overhead

notable_agents.action: walking ahead of the camera along the sidewalk

entered.detail: massive floating holographic advertisement with changing imagery
modern glass and steel building facade with illuminated windows

segments.scene_description: Moving past the gas station, the scene opens into a wider commercial street lined with glass buildings and massive digital billboards. The elevated highway remains overhead but feels less enclosing. Moderate pedestrian traffic moves in various directions while cars flow steadily in the multi-lane street to the right.

scene_state.functional_zone: busy intersection approach with crosswalk zones

events.description: slowing approach toward stairway entrance on the left side

agents.ego_description: approaching a busy intersection area while navigating around other pedestrians

entered.detail: zebra crossing markings and expanded pedestrian area at the intersection
concrete stairs leading up to an elevated pedestrian walkway

segments.scene_description: The street opens into a wider intersection area with visible crosswalk markings. Multiple digital screens and billboards dominate the view ahead. The camera approaches a stairway entrance on the left while maintaining a steady walking pace along the sidewalk.

events.description: turning left and ascending concrete stairs from street level to elevated walkway
reaching the top of stairs and emerging onto the elevated walkway with open city views

agents.ego_description: climbing the concrete stairway and emerging onto an elevated walkway overlooking the street below

entered.detail: wide concrete staircase with metal railings leading upward
concrete pedestrian platform with railings overlooking the street
view of futuristic skyscrapers and industrial structures in the distance

segments.scene_description: The camera turns and ascends a concrete stairway, transitioning from the busy street to an elevated pedestrian walkway. Upon reaching the top, the view opens to show the distant cityscape and the street now visible below. The area is deserted with some debris scattered on the concrete platform.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous first-person movement from a confined urban underpass into a wide, neon-lit commercial thoroughfare. It begins beneath the heavy shadow of a massive elevated highway, passing a CHOOH2 gas station on the left while purple neon lights glow along the right. As the camera moves forward, the oppressive overhead structure begins to recede, allowing the environment to open up into a broader streetscape. The scene then expands to reveal towering glass buildings and massive digital billboards that dominate the skyline. Finally, the view shifts from the narrow sidewalk to a bustling city center where steady vehicle traffic and crowds of pedestrians flow through the vibrant district.

The shot follows a continuous camera movement from a bustling, neon-lit street intersection up to a desolate elevated pedestrian walkway. It begins by moving along a sidewalk toward a wide intersection dominated by towering digital screens and holographic billboards. As the camera maintains a steady pace, it turns toward a concrete stairway on the left and begins to ascend. The scene then shifts from the crowded commercial atmosphere of the street to the quiet of a higher vantage point, where the view opens to reveal the distant cityscape and the traffic flowing below. Finally, the camera settles on the deserted concrete platform, surrounded by scattered debris and a wide urban horizon.
